headline: Exxon Mobil Gains Influence As Hormuz Blockade Rewrites Global Oil Trade
summary: The U.S. Navy has imposed a blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, materially disrupting global oil flows and tanker traffic. This disruption has led to higher global oil prices and a shift in trade routes toward producers outside the Gulf. Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is seeing higher realized oil prices and stronger export demand as buyers seek alternative supply. The company’s role in global energy security has become more prominent as U.S. barrels gain importance in seaborne trade. Exxon Mobil,...
